rationale_notes: 1:1 randomisation but concealment detail limited; open-label diet (performance bias possible); 36/36 per arm analysed; HbA1c lab-measured (objective); registered ChiCTR2000038036 with pre-specified consensus-based primary outcome. Single-assessor provisional rating — confirm with dual RoB2.
